question: Which states have the highest revenue?
sql: SELECT u.state, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` u ON u.id = oi.user_id WHERE oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') AND u.country = 'United States' GROUP BY u.state ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
analyst_notes: users.state is global — it holds provinces and regions from every market (Guangdong, England, Sao Paulo...). For 'state' questions default to country = 'United States' and say so; only go global when the user asks. Note country spellings are literal strings: 'United States', 'Brasil'.
author: artem
